mapper.select: SELECT SETTL_DEAL_NO, SETTL_NO, PAY_STATUS, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'MPAY' AND USE_YN='Y' AND DTL_CD= T.PAY_STATUS) AS PAY_STATUS_NM, (SELECT INDC_ODRG FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'MPAY' AND USE_YN='Y' AND DTL_CD= T.PAY_STATUS) AS PAY_STATUS_CD, SETTL_DT, SETTL_DT_FMT, SETTL_NM, AMT, TMON_LMT_AMT, RMND_LMT_AMT, PTNR_PG_ID, PTNR_PG_NM, PTNR_CP_ID, PTNR_CP_NM, PTNR_SVC_ID, PTNR_SVC_NM FROM( SELECT S.SETTL_DEAL_NO, -- PK S.SETTL_NO, -- 결제번호 CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_MPAY_SETTL_KIS WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND NSTEP_SVC_CONT_NO= #{svcCntrNo} AND S.SETTL_NO= SETTL_NO) > 1 THEN 'PRTLPAY' ELSE 'FULLPAY' END AS PAY_STATUS, -- 부분결제, 결제 구분 S.SETTL_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SETTL_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS SETTL_DT_FMT, -- 결제일시 S.SETTL_NM, -- 구매상품 S.SETTL_AMT AS AMT, -- 금액 S.TMON_LMT_AMT, -- 당월한도금액 S.RMND_LMT_AMT, -- 잔여한도금액 S.PTNR_PG_ID, S.PTNR_PG_NM, -- 결제대행사 S.PTNR_CP_ID, S.PTNR_CP_NM, -- 이용업체명 S.PTNR_SVC_ID, S.PTNR_SVC_NM -- 이용서비스 FROM NMCP_MPAY_SETTL_KIS S WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND NSTEP_SVC_CONT_NO= #{svcCntrNo} -- 계약번호 AND (SUBSTR(SETTL_DT, 0,6) = #{mPayPeriod}) -- 날짜 조건 UNION ALL SELECT S.SETTL_DEAL_NO, -- PK S.SETTL_NO, -- 결제번호 CASE WHEN (C.PRTL_CNCL_YN='Y') THEN 'PRTLCNCL' WHEN(C.PRTL_CNCL_YN='N') THEN 'FULLCNCL' ELSE '' END AS PAY_STATUS, -- 부분취소, 취소 S.SETTL_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SETTL_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS SETTL_DT_FMT, -- 결제일시 S.SETTL_NM, -- 구매상품 CASE WHEN (C.PRTL_CNCL_YN= 'N') THEN C.SETTL_AMT ELSE C.CNCL_AMT END AS AMT, -- 취소금액 S.TMON_LMT_AMT, -- 당월한도금액 S.RMND_LMT_AMT, -- 잔여한도금액 S.PTNR_PG_ID, S.PTNR_PG_NM, -- 결제대행사 S.PTNR_CP_ID, S.PTNR_CP_NM, -- 이용업체명 S.PTNR_SVC_ID, S.PTNR_SVC_NM -- 이용서비스 FROM ( SELECT SETTL_DEAL_NO, SETTL_NO, SETTL_DT, SETTL_NM, TMON_LMT_AMT, RMND_LMT_AMT, PTNR_PG_ID, PTNR_PG_NM, PTNR_CP_ID, PTNR_CP_NM, PTNR_SVC_ID, PTNR_SVC_NM FROM NMCP_MPAY_SETTL_KIS WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND NSTEP_SVC_CONT_NO= #{svcCntrNo} -- 계약번호 AND (SUBSTR(SETTL_DT, 0,6) = #{mPayPeriod}) -- 날짜 조건 ) S , NMCP_MPAY_CANCEL_KIS C WHERE S.SETTL_DEAL_NO = C.SETTL_DEAL_NO(+) ) T WHERE PAY_STATUS IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SETTL_DT DESC , PAY_STATUS_CD ASC

SELECT MONTH_TITLE, MONTH_FIRST_DAY, MONTH_LAST_DAY FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -(LEVEL- 1)), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_TITLE, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)+1,-(LEVEL)),'YYYY.MM.DD') MONTH_FIRST_DAY, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE),-(LEVEL-1)),'YYYY.MM.DD') MONTH_LAST_DAY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 13 ) WHERE TO_DATE(MONTH_TITLE, 'YYYYMM') >= TO_DATE('202207','YYYYMM')
SELECT CHG_YN FROM ( SELECT CHG_YN FROM NMCP_MPAY_TERMS_KIS WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND SUBSTR(JUICE_SRC_COMB_ID,0,9) = #{svcCntrNo} ORDER BY RQT_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM=1
SELECT ADJ_AMT FROM ( SELECT ADJ_AMT FROM NMCP_MPAY_ADJUST_KIS WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND SUBSTR(JUICE_SRC_COMB_ID,0,9) = #{svcCntrNo} ORDER BY RQT_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM=1
SELECT TMON_LMT_AMT FROM ( SELECT TMON_LMT_AMT FROM NMCP_MPAY_SETTL_KIS WHERE VENDOR_CD= 'KIS' AND NSTEP_SVC_CONT_NO= #{svcCntrNo} ORDER BY SETTL_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM =1
